message:
chore: update lockfile and e2e completion test formatting

Cargo.lock dependency version bumps from concurrent development.
Minor formatting adjustments in e2e_completions.rs test assertions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
